identity.name: E1 POS
identity.core_philosophy: The Anti-AI Designer: High density, dark mode by default, rich textures over flat colors.

headings.usage: All headers, price tags, table numbers, and receipt-style data.

typography.install_instructions: Import via Google Fonts in index.css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@500;600;700&family=Manrope:wght@400;500;700&display=swap');

spacing_and_layout.scale: Generous spacing (2-3x standard). Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers.

grid_system.mode_a_tetris: For Menus/Gallery. Mix col-span-2 (Square), col-span-4 (Hero), col-span-1 (Filler). Gap-4.
grid_system.mode_b_density: For Admin/POS. Grid-cols-12. Zero waste. Gap-2 or Gap-4. Full height usage.

cards.style: Flat, dark zinc-900 background, 1px border-zinc-800. No heavy shadows. Rounded-md.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-500 text-black font-bold rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider hover:translate-y-[-1px]

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950 border-zinc-800 focus:border-amber-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-amber-500 rounded-sm

navigation.sidebar: Fixed left, w-64, bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800. Links: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 text-zinc-400 hover:text-amber-500 hover:bg-zinc-900 rounded-md transition-all.

tables.style: w-full text-sm. Header: text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-widest text-xs. Row: border-b border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-900/50.

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise/grain on the main background to avoid 'digital flatness'.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/5 for sticky headers.
visual_enhancers.glows: Active tables/orders get a subtle box-shadow: 0 0 20px -5px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.3).

images.description: Modern dark restaurant interior for login/signup pages.
Gourmet burger on dark background for menu item.
Fresh salad for healthy menu section.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width={1.5} for a refined look. Size 16-20px for UI, 24px for Nav.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use flat dark colors or subtle textures.
DO NOT center text unless it is a Hero title. Left align everything else.
All interactive elements must have a 'data-testid'.
Buttons must have a hover state that lightens the background or adds a border.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all numbers (prices, dates, counts).
Never use 'transparent' background for dropdowns or modals.
